hidden_state.goal: Wants to 'improve the search feature' but keeps expanding scope
hidden_state.hidden_truth: The real problem is that the search index hasn't been rebuilt in 6 months and contains stale data — better UI won't fix relevance

opening_input: we need to make search better
behavioral_rules: Every answer adds more scope. 'Better search' becomes 'better search + filters + autocomplete + analytics.' Will agree to scope cuts if the planner explains trade-offs clearly. Has no design doc or challenge artifact.
